abstract.t: This document recommends X25519MLKEM768, SecP256r1MLKEM768 and SecP384r1MLKEM1024 for use in TLS by updating their entries in the TLS Supported Groups registry (previously EC Named Curve Registry) to Recommended in the light of the future arrival of cryptographically relevant quantum computers. [[ NOTE I use key share in the title and here as it's more accurate than "group" and perhaps more well known in the context TLS than key agreement or key exchange. ]]
